idea: Automate product listing optimization for e-commerce stores with AI-powered SEO and pricing

research.problem_statement: Businesses in ecommerce spend significant manual effort on: Automate product listing optimization for e-commerce stores with AI-powered SEO and pricing. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.
research.target_audience: E-commerce store owners, DTC brands, marketplace sellers
research.competitor_analysis: Shopify apps cover basics but lack multi-step AI orchestration. Custom solutions require dev teams.
research.technical_feasibility: High — well-understood patterns, available APIs, proven agent architectures
research.roi_estimate: Saves 10+ hours/week on product management. Pays for itself in 1-2 weeks.

roadmap.project_name: Automate Product Listing Optimization For E Commer
roadmap.description: Businesses in ecommerce spend significant manual effort on: Automate product listing optimization for e-commerce stores with AI-powered SEO and pricing. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.

agent_pipeline.name: product_analyzer
agent_pipeline.role: Analyze product listings, pricing, reviews, competitive positioning

agent_pipeline.name: pricing_agent
agent_pipeline.role: Monitor competitor pricing, recommend dynamic pricing adjustments

agent_pipeline.name: review_manager
agent_pipeline.role: Aggregate reviews, generate response templates, flag urgent issues

milestones.name: Agent 1: product_analyzer
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for analyze product listings, pricing, reviews, competitive positioning

milestones.name: Agent 2: content_optimizer
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for generate seo-optimized titles, descriptions, tags

milestones.name: Agent 3: pricing_agent
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for monitor competitor pricing, recommend dynamic pricing adjustments

milestones.name: Agent 4: review_manager
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for aggregate reviews, generate response templates, flag urgent issues

milestones.name: Integration & Publish
milestones.deliverable: Full pipeline tested, repo published, marketplace listing created
milestones.acceptance: End-to-end pipeline runs, all tests pass, repo is public
